nasb.text: For the report of your obedience has reached to all; therefore I am rejoicing over you, but I want you to be wise in what is good and innocent in what is evil.

esv.text: For your obedience is known to all, so that I rejoice over you, but I want you to be wise as to what is good and innocent as to what is evil.

cnv.text: 你們的順服已經名聞各處，所以我為你們高興。我願你們在善事上有智慧，在惡事上毫不沾染。

ccb.text: 你们对主的顺服已人人皆知，我为你们高兴，我希望你们在好事上聪明，在坏事上无知。

csbs.text: 你们的顺从，大家都知道了，所以我为你们而欢喜。但我希望你们在善事上有智慧，在恶事上无知。
